issue_title: [BUG]: Staggered Menu flicker on first DOM Render
issue_body_preview:
### Describe the issue

Staggered Menu Flicker on each page refresh / first DOM render.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/535bebf6-638c-4c0c-9a1b-9c2bf883b070

### Reproduction Link

_No response_

### Steps to reproduce

```sh
bun create next-app@latest --yes .
bun x --bun shadcn@latest a
test_description_zh: 在页面中集成 Staggered Menu 组件，刷新页面（或首次加载页面），观察菜单项在首次 DOM 渲染时的视觉表现。
expected_result_zh: 页面首次加载或刷新时，Staggered Menu 组件应平滑渲染，菜单项不应出现闪烁、跳动或短暂可见后消失再出现的现象。
